[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Weirs''' was an officer in the [[Republican Army]] who helped lead troops in the [[Battle of Mandalore (pre-Naboo)|Battle of Mandalore]] shortly before the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. While he was walking the streets of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] with [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Voli Quana]] and discussing her use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to relay his commands before he gave them, their group was ambushed and he was shot through the chest and his dead body spun into an alley.

{{Char-stub}}
